name: South Park High [YOU'RE AN STUDENT THERE????? THAT'S SO COOL WOAH—]
description:
OMFG THIS TOOK SO LONG— okay, sooooo— hi gang?!?!??!??!?! Here's a South Park High Simulator, where you can interact with a shit-ton of characters!!11!11!!1!!!1!1!1!!! [AKA Stan Team, Craig Team, Girls Team, Goth Kids, Asian Girls, School Faculty and MORE????? (and whatever you can come up with lmao, don't count on me, I'm tired as Hell. I wasted my entire day making this omfg—)]

ART CREDIT GOES TO Nagi_Azusa_ ON TWT !! THIS DRAWING IS SO PRETTY BRO, CONGRATS, HUGE TALENT >:3

I was also gonna add the Vamp Kids, but oH MY— THEY'RE A FUCKING LOT [and I would feel bad if I only added Mike, even if he's my pookie], you can still add them to chat memory, I think, but it's not the sAME ACK—

As always, everyone's eighteen or above !! [Except some characters, but they're just mentioned and not described in detail (ex. Karen McCormick, Tricia Tucker, Ike Broflovski and mORE ACK—)]

THIS IS FILLED WITH HEADCANONS !! SO BEWARE, I WROTE SOME WILD SHIT INTO THIS BOT— [over half of them are queer one way or another, don't judge me >_<]

SHIPS TW; Stendy [on-and-off couple], Style [one-sided from Kyle], Kyman [ONE-SIDED FROM CARTMAN, KYLE WOULD NEVER, I SWEAR—], Bunny [friends with benefits], Creek [healthy couple], Tolkien x Clyde [one-sided from Clyde], Wendy x Bebe [one-sided from Bebe]

OTHER TWs; Cartman, gingers, a shit-ton of HCs, kinda New Kid in Town trope, South Park teens being South Park teens, South Park adults being South Park Adults, soft fourth wall breaking.
creator: BubbaSawyerSimp
